result.stdout:
Description:

Usage:
  PBReporter [command] [options]

Options:
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information
  --version       Show version information

Commands:
  compare  Compare two BenchmarkDotNet reports and produce a diff report.

commands.payload:
Description:

Usage:
  PBReporter [command] [options]

Options:
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information
  --version       Show version information

Commands:
  compare  Compare two BenchmarkDotNet reports and produce a diff report.

result.stdout:
Description:
  Compare two BenchmarkDotNet reports and produce a diff report.

Usage:
  PBReporter compare [options]

Options:
  -b, --baseline <baseline> (REQUIRED)                Path to the folder or file with Baseline report.
  -t, --target <target> (REQUIRED)                    Path to the folder or file with target reports.
  -tm, --threshold-mean <threshold-mean>              Throw an error when the mean threshold is met. Examples: 5%, 10ms, 10us, 100ns, 1s.
  -ta, --threshold-allocation <threshold-allocation>  Throw an error when the allocation threshold is met. Examples: 5%, 10b, 10kb, 100mb, 1gb.
  -f, --format <format>                               Output format for the report. [default: console]
  -o, --output <output>                               Output directory to export the diff report. Default is current directory. [default: ./BenchmarkReporter]
  -fw, --fail-on-warnings                             Exit with error code when the comparison generates any warnings.
  -ft, --fail-on-threshold-hit                        Exit with error code when any threshold is hit during comparison.
  -?, -h, --help                                      Show help and usage information

Description:
  Compare two BenchmarkDotNet reports and produce a diff report.

Usage:
  PBReporter compare [options]

Options:
  -b, --baseline <baseline> (REQUIRED)                Path to the folder or file with Baseline report.
  -t, --target <target> (REQUIRED)                    Path to the folder or file with target reports.
  -tm, --threshold-mean <threshold-mean>              Throw an error when the mean threshold is met. Examples: 5%, 10ms, 10us, 100ns, 1s.
  -ta, --threshold-allocation <threshold-allocation>  Throw an error when the allocation threshold is met. Examples: 5%, 10b, 10kb, 100mb, 1gb.
  -f, --format <format>                               Output format for the report. [default: console]
  -o, --output <output>                               Output directory to export the diff report. Default is current directory. [default: ./BenchmarkReporter]
  -fw, --fail-on-warnings                             Exit with error code when the comparison generates any warnings.
  -ft, --fail-on-threshold-hit                        Exit with error code when any threshold is hit during comparison.
  -?, -h, --help                                      Show help and usage information
